calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: JPT Joseph Jedeikin, Clerk Karissa Shaw, not reported. (525)

APPEARANCES:
Respondent; Terry L. McGill, in pro per with his witnesses Esperanza McGill and Shaun McGill
Appellant; Shi Yu Young, in pro per with her interpreter Mabel Wan (Cantonese)

This cause came on regularly for trial de novo having been continued from 1/18/06. All parties, witnesses, and interpreter are sworn.

Court questions litigants regarding factual issues of case.

Appellant Young testifies on her own behalf through her interpreter Mabel Wan.

Appellant's Exhibits introduced into evidence:
#1(1-3) - 2 Invoices (#255 and #271) and a $4,500.00 check #1759
#2(1-13) - 13 pages of invoices and banking account statements
#3(1-3) - 3 photos of bathroom
#4(1-5) - 5 photos of kitchen

The Court and the Respondent question Appellant Young regarding her exhibits and testimony.

Appellant's Exhibits introduced into evidence:
#5 - Copy of Robert Tam's business card
#6 - Invoice from Urgent Rooter & Plumbing, Inc. 722

The Court and Respondent McGill question the Appellant regarding Exhibits #5 and #6.

Appellant's witness Robert Tam, through interpreter Mabel Wan, is sworn and examined by Respondent McGill.

Respondent McGill testifies on his own behalf and presents his case to the Court.

Respondent's Exhibits introduced into evidence:
A(1-5) - 5 photos of kitchen
B - Invoice from Carter's Electric
C - 2 Invoices (Al Norman Plumbing, #1326 and Roto-Rooter, #B-4739)
D(1-4) - 4 Photos of Respondent's driveway
E - Handwritten lett from handyman
F - Electrical Permit #E200508019188
G - Respondent's Banking Account Statement for check 1755
H(1-2) - 2 photos re: painting (1) bathroom window and (2) fixture and molding

Respondent's witness, Shaun McGill (previously sworn), is examined by Respondent McGill.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JUDGMENT RENDERED.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Continued To Mar-08-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
